settings.label: t:settings_schema.animations.settings.animations_hover_elements.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.animations.settings.animations_hover_elements.info

settings.label: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_vendor.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_vendor.info

settings.label: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_price.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.search_input.settings.predictive_search_show_price.info

settings.label: t:settings_schema.cart.settings.cart_drawer.collection.label
settings.info: t:settings_schema.cart.settings.cart_drawer.collection.info

settings.label: Subscription discount percent
settings.info: Compounded with volume savings for subscription cart lines.

settings.label: Add-on bundle discount percent
settings.info: Extra discount stacked on top of volume and subscription savings for add-on (Hair Oil) cart lines.

settings.label: Offer button label template
settings.info: Use [qty] and [percent]. Keep this short for mobile.

settings.label: Pack label template
settings.info: Use [qty] for the current cart line quantity.

settings.label: Cart control corner radius
settings.info: Controls cart drawer buttons, badges, promo boxes, and checkout radius.

settings.label: Tax note
settings.default: *Taxes, shipping and discounts calculated at checkout.

settings.label: Free shipping threshold
settings.info: Enter the amount in store currency units, for example 100 for $100.

settings.label: Progress text
settings.default: Add [amount] more and get Free Shipping
settings.info: Use [amount] where the remaining amount should appear.

settings.label: CTA text
settings.info: Use [X] or [percent] for the discount value.

settings.label: Subscription discount percent
settings.info: Used for the CTA label fallback and matching the displayed subscription discount.

settings.content: Global discount display — PDP tiers, cart labels, subscription. UI only; actual discounts are applied by Appstle / Shopify / SMART.

settings.label: Subscription discount %
settings.info: Override per product via metafield bloomli.subscription_discount_pct.

settings.label: Bundle add-on discount %
settings.info: Display-only. Applied to add-on price when supplement is also in cart. Override per product via metafield bloomli.bundle_add_on_discount_pct.

settings.label: Enable cart routine upsell
settings.info: Shows a product upsell card when only one of the paired products is in the cart.

settings.label: Supplement product
settings.info: e.g. Gummies — shown as upsell when add-on is in cart but supplement is not.

settings.label: Add-on product
settings.info: e.g. Hair Oil — shown as upsell when supplement is in cart but add-on is not.

settings.label: Supplement product tag
settings.info: Cart item tag that identifies a supplement product.

settings.label: Add-on product tag
settings.info: Cart item tag that identifies an add-on product.

settings.content: State 1: supplement in cart, no add-on

settings.label: Add-on Pair & Save discount percent
settings.info: Discount applied to the add-on price in the upsell card. Set to 0 to show regular price.

settings.label: Body text
settings.default: Add Hair Oil and unlock Pair & Save.

settings.content: State 2: add-on in cart, no supplement

settings.label: Body text
settings.default: Add Gummies to activate Pair & Save on your Hair Oil.

settings.label: Subscription discount percent
settings.info: Discount applied first when a subscription is active. For the add-on, the Pair & Save discount is also stacked on top.

settings.label: Logo image
settings.info: Leave blank to use the same logo as the site header.

settings.label: Subheading
settings.default: To claim, share what problem you're trying to solve:

settings.label: No thanks text
settings.default: No thanks, I don't like savings

settings.label: Body text
settings.default: Sign up for email to receive your discount!

settings.label: Success message
settings.default: Check your email for your Bloomli offer.
